hero.eyebrow: A reference guide for multilingual grammar
hero.body: Every grammar concept, three languages, one view. From articles to zero copulas — understand how Spanish, English and Chinese build meaning differently.

languages.topicDesc: Each topic shows how {language} handles the concept, with examples and common pitfalls.
languages.heroDesc: Explore {count} grammar topics for {language}. Each concept explained with real examples — no comparisons, just the rules that matter.

topics.title: Grammar concepts
topics.subtitle: Each topic explains the idea, then shows how Spanish, English and Chinese implement it.
topics.heroDesc: {count} grammar concepts documented across Spanish, English, and Chinese.

legal.label: Legal
legal.cookiesDesc: Grammar Navigator uses cookies to improve your browsing experience, analyze site traffic, and serve personalized content. By continuing to use this site, you consent to our use of cookies in accordance with this policy.
legal.privacyDesc: Grammar Navigator respects your privacy. This policy explains what information we collect, how we use it, and your rights regarding your personal data when you use our grammar reference and comparison tools.
legal.termsDesc: By using Grammar Navigator, you agree to these Terms of Service. The site is provided as-is for educational reference. We do not guarantee accuracy for every use case and are not liable for decisions made based on the content.
legal.disclaimerDesc: The content on Grammar Navigator is for educational and reference purposes only. While we strive for accuracy, grammar rules vary by dialect, register, and context. Always consult authoritative sources for academic or professional decisions.
legal.affiliateDesc: Some links on Grammar Navigator may be affiliate links. If you click an affiliate link and make a purchase, we may receive a small commission at no extra cost to you. This helps keep the site free. We only recommend resources we believe are genuinely useful.
legal.contactDesc: Have a question, suggestion, or found an error? We welcome feedback from learners and teachers alike. Reach out and we will get back to you as soon as possible.
legal.privacyInfoDesc: We use Google Analytics 4 to understand how visitors interact with the site. This may include anonymized data such as pages visited, time on site, and approximate location (country/city level). We do not collect personally identifiable information unless you voluntarily contact us via email.
legal.privacyCookiesDesc: We use cookies for analytics and, with your consent, for personalized advertising via Google AdSense. You can manage your cookie preferences at any time through the cookie banner or your browser settings.
legal.privacyRightsDesc: You have the right to access, rectify, or delete any personal data we hold. To exercise these rights, please contact us at mathias.paulenko@outlook.com.
legal.privacyThirdDesc: We rely on trusted third-party services including Google Analytics, Google AdSense, and GitHub Pages for hosting. These services have their own privacy policies.
legal.privacySecurityDesc: Since Grammar Navigator is a static site, there is no user database to breach. Analytics data is handled by Google under their security standards. All data transmission uses industry-standard encryption (TLS/SSL).
legal.privacyRetentionDesc: Google Analytics retains aggregated data according to Google's data retention policies (typically 2–14 months depending on settings). Cookie consent preferences are stored locally in your browser via localStorage until you clear them.
legal.privacyChildrenDesc: Grammar Navigator does not knowingly collect data from children under 13. If you believe a child has provided personal information, please contact us and we will promptly delete such information.
legal.privacyChangesDesc: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Any changes will be posted on this page with an updated revision date.
legal.termsUseDesc: You may use the content on this site for personal, educational, and non-commercial purposes. You may not republish, sell, or redistribute the content without prior written permission.
legal.termsWarrantyDesc: All content is provided "as is" without warranties of any kind, either express or implied. We do not guarantee that the content is accurate, complete, or up to date.
legal.termsLiabilityDesc: In no event shall Grammar Navigator or its contributors be liable for any damages arising from the use or inability to use the materials on this site.
legal.termsChangesDesc: We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time. Continued use of the site after changes constitutes acceptance of the new terms.
legal.termsAcceptableDesc: You agree not to use Grammar Navigator to: distribute malware or harmful code; scrape or crawl content in a way that degrades site performance; impersonate any person or entity; or use the site for any unlawful purpose.
legal.termsIpDesc: The Grammar Navigator name, logo, and original written content are the property of the site operator. Third-party trademarks and brand names referenced belong to their respective owners.
legal.termsLinksDesc: Grammar Navigator may contain links to external websites, including affiliate links. We are not responsible for the content, privacy practices, or availability of those sites. See our Affiliate Disclosure for details.
legal.termsIndemnificationDesc: You agree to indemnify and hold harmless Grammar Navigator and its operator from any claims, damages, or expenses arising from your use of the site, violation of these terms, or infringement of any third-party rights.
legal.termsLawDesc: These terms shall be governed by and construed in accordance with applicable local laws.
legal.cookiesWhatDesc: Cookies are small text files stored on your device when you visit a website. They help the site remember your preferences, understand how you use it, and deliver relevant content.
legal.cookiesTypesAnal: Analytics cookies — Help us understand how visitors interact with the site (via Google Analytics).
legal.cookiesTypesAd: Advertising cookies — Used by Google AdSense to serve personalized ads (only with your consent).
legal.cookiesTypesFunc: Functional cookies — Remember your language preference and cookie consent choice.
legal.cookiesManageDesc: You can manage or delete cookies at any time through your browser settings. You can also update your consent preferences using the cookie banner at the bottom of the page.
legal.cookiesTableAnalyticsDesc: Anonymous page views and session data via Google Analytics
legal.cookiesManageOptOut: You can also opt out of Google Analytics tracking by installing the Google Analytics Opt-out Browser Add-on.
legal.cookiesImpactDesc: Disabling essential cookies may cause the site to forget your language preference. Disabling analytics cookies will not affect site functionality but helps us keep Grammar Navigator free by understanding what content is most useful.
legal.cookiesThirdDesc: We use third-party services (Google Analytics, Google AdSense) that may set their own cookies. These services have independent cookie policies.
legal.disclaimerAdviceDesc: The information provided on this website does not constitute legal, academic, or professional advice. Grammar rules evolve, and conventions differ between institutions, style guides, and regions.
legal.disclaimerLinksDesc: We may link to third-party websites for further reading. We are not responsible for the content, accuracy, or availability of external sites.
legal.disclaimerErrorsDesc: Despite our best efforts, errors may exist. If you spot something incorrect, please contact us so we can improve the resource for everyone.
legal.disclaimerIpDesc: All original written content, design, and branding on Grammar Navigator is the property of the site operator unless otherwise stated. Third-party trademarks and brand names belong to their respective owners.
legal.disclaimerDmcaDesc: We respect intellectual property rights. If you believe content on Grammar Navigator infringes your copyright, please send a detailed takedown notice to mathias.paulenko@outlook.com including: your contact information, identification of the copyrighted work, identification of the infringing material, and a statement of good faith.
legal.disclaimerAccuracyDesc: Language and grammar evolve. While we make reasonable efforts to keep content current, some information may become outdated. We encourage readers to verify details against official language resources. Last updated dates are provided where applicable.
legal.affiliateTransparentDesc: We believe in being transparent with our readers. Any product, service, or resource we mention because we genuinely believe it adds value to language learners.
legal.affiliateCostDesc: Clicking an affiliate link does not increase the price you pay. The commission comes from the merchant's marketing budget, not your pocket.
legal.affiliateIndependentDesc: Affiliate relationships do not influence our editorial content. Comparisons, reviews, and recommendations are based on merit and usefulness, not compensation.
legal.affiliateAdvertisingDesc: Grammar Navigator may display advertisements through Google AdSense. Ads are clearly distinguishable from editorial content. Ad networks may use cookies to serve ads based on your browsing history. You can manage ad personalization through your browser settings or the Google Ads Settings page.
legal.affiliateDonationsDesc: We accept voluntary donations through Ko-fi. These contributions help keep the content free and growing. Donations do not influence editorial decisions.
legal.affiliateFtcDesc: In compliance with U.S. Federal Trade Commission (FTC) guidelines and similar regulations in other jurisdictions, we disclose our affiliate relationships clearly. This disclosure page is linked from our footer.
legal.legalNoticeDesc: This legal notice governs your use of the Grammar Navigator website. By accessing this site, you acknowledge and agree to the provisions below.
legal.legalOwnerDesc: Grammar Navigator is operated by an independent developer. For any inquiries, legal notices, or takedown requests, please contact us at mathias.paulenko@outlook.com. We aim to respond within 5 business days.
legal.legalLiabilityDesc: The content on Grammar Navigator is provided for informational and educational purposes only. While we strive for accuracy, we make no warranties regarding the completeness, reliability, or suitability of the information for any particular purpose. We are not liable for any damages arising from the use of this site.
legal.legalLinksDesc: Grammar Navigator may contain links to third-party websites, including affiliate links. We are not responsible for the content, accuracy, privacy practices, or availability of those external sites.
legal.legalIpDesc: All original written content, design, and branding on Grammar Navigator is the property of the site operator unless otherwise stated. Third-party trademarks and brand names referenced belong to their respective owners.
legal.legalDmcaDesc: We respect intellectual property rights. If you believe content infringes your copyright, please send a detailed takedown notice to mathias.paulenko@outlook.com including: (1) your contact information, (2) identification of the copyrighted work, (3) identification of the infringing material, (4) a statement of good faith, and (5) your signature.
legal.legalAccuracyDesc: Language and grammar rules evolve. While we make reasonable efforts to keep content current, some information may become outdated. We encourage readers to verify details against official language resources. Last updated dates are provided where applicable.
legal.legalLawDesc: This legal notice is governed by the laws applicable in the jurisdiction of the site operator, without regard to conflict of law principles. Any disputes shall be resolved in the competent courts of that jurisdiction.

learningPaths.heroDesc: A structured journey from first concepts to advanced usage. Follow the stages in order, or jump to the topic you need.
learningPaths.stageBeginnerDesc: Start here. These concepts form the bedrock of the language.
learningPaths.stageIntermediateDesc: Expand your range. Connect ideas and express more nuance.
learningPaths.stageAdvancedDesc: Refine your command. Handle subtle distinctions and complex structures.

pagefind.alt_search: No results for [SEARCH_TERM]. Showing results for [DIFFERENT_TERM] instead.

comparisons.selectLanguageToView: Select at least one language to view comparisons

howItWorks.title: How Grammar Navigator works
howItWorks.intro: Grammar Navigator is built around a simple idea: grammar is easier to understand when you see how different languages solve the same problem. Instead of learning three separate grammars, you learn one concept and compare three solutions.
howItWorks.step1Body: Start with a grammar idea — articles, pronouns, verb tenses — not a language.
howItWorks.step2Body: Read how Spanish, English and Chinese each handle the same idea.
howItWorks.step3Body: Use the comparison table to spot patterns and differences at a glance.
howItWorks.step4Body: Jump into any topic. No sign-up, no ads, no paywall — just clear comparisons.

footer.rights: An open grammar reference. Not a course — a map.
footer.cookieBanner: We use cookies to improve your experience and understand how the site is used.

landing.grammarDesc: Every grammar concept explained across languages. Instead of learning three separate grammars, learn one concept and compare three solutions.
landing.languagesDesc: Explore grammar organized by each language. Deep dives into Spanish, English, and Chinese grammar systems.
landing.vocabularyDesc: Build your vocabulary with curated word lists, common phrases, idiomatic expressions, and frequency-based learning.
landing.learningPathsDesc: Follow a structured path through grammar and vocabulary for each language. From beginner to advanced, one step at a time.
landing.flashcardsDesc: Reinforce what you learn with interactive flashcards. Flip, test, and master grammar, vocabulary, and phrases.
landing.vocabWordsDesc: Curated word lists organized by usefulness. Learn the most common words first.
landing.vocabPhrasesDesc: Everyday phrases and expressions for real conversations.
landing.vocabExpressionsDesc: Idiomatic expressions and colloquialisms across languages.
landing.flashcardsGrammarDesc: Reinforce grammar concepts with interactive flip cards.
landing.flashcardsVocabDesc: Build your vocabulary one card at a time.
landing.flashcardsPhrasesDesc: Master common phrases with spaced repetition.
landing.pathDescription: Every learning path follows the same five-stage structure. You move from the basics to advanced usage, one concept at a time.
landing.structuredJourney: A structured journey through {language} grammar and vocabulary. From first concepts to advanced usage.
landing.spanishDesc: A Romance language with rich verb conjugation, grammatical gender, and a transparent spelling system.
landing.englishDesc: A Germanic language with minimal inflection, analytical structure, and the largest vocabulary of any language.
landing.chineseDesc: A Sino-Tibetan language with tones, characters, measure words, and no grammatical gender or verb conjugation.
landing.howGrammar1Body: Start with a grammar idea — articles, pronouns, verb tenses — not a language.
landing.howGrammar2Body: Read how Spanish, English and Chinese each handle the same idea, with real examples.
landing.howGrammar3Body: Use the comparison table to spot patterns and differences at a glance.
landing.howGrammar4Body: Jump into individual topics or comparisons. No sign-up needed — just clear explanations.
landing.howLanguages1Body: Select Spanish, English, or Chinese to see grammar organized by that language alone.
landing.howLanguages2Body: Each language page contains the same concepts but framed within one grammar system.
landing.howLanguages3Body: No side-by-side tables. Just the rules, patterns, and examples for this language alone.
landing.howLanguages4Body: Deepen your understanding of one language while keeping the others within reach.
landing.howVocabulary1Body: Pick from Words, Phrases, or Expressions depending on what you need.
landing.howVocabulary2Body: Each list is organized by usefulness. Learn the most common words and phrases first.
landing.howVocabulary3Body: See translations, pronunciations, and usage examples side by side.
landing.howVocabulary4Body: Reinforce what you learn by flipping cards in the Flashcards section.
landing.howLearningPaths1Body: Choose a path for Spanish, English, or Chinese. Each path is tailored to that language.
landing.howLearningPaths2Body: Move through Foundations, Building Blocks, Connecting, Expressing, and Refining.
landing.howLearningPaths3Body: Each stage covers both grammar concepts and essential vocabulary for real progress.
landing.howLearningPaths4Body: Complete topics at your own pace. The path adapts to what you've already learned.
landing.howFlashcards1Body: Pick Grammar, Vocabulary, or Phrases. Each deck is focused on a specific skill.
landing.howFlashcards2Body: See the question, think of the answer, then click or tap to flip the card and check.
landing.howFlashcards3Body: Go through the deck at your own pace. Cards shuffle to keep your brain engaged.
landing.howFlashcards4Body: Review decks regularly. Spaced repetition helps move knowledge into long-term memory.

flashcards.demoInstruction: Click the card below to see the answer. This is how every flashcard in Grammar Navigator works.
flashcards.clickToFlip: Click or press Space to flip
flashcards.clickToFlipBack: Click or press Space to flip back
flashcards.keyboardHint: ← → arrows to navigate · Space to flip
flashcards.demoQuestion: How do you form questions in Chinese without changing word order?
flashcards.demoAnswer: Add 吗 (ma) at the end of the statement.
flashcards.demoExample: 你去 = You go. 你去吗？ = Do you go?
flashcards.grammarDesc: Test your knowledge of grammar rules across all three languages. From articles to zero copulas.
flashcards.vocabularyDesc: Memorize words with spaced repetition. Words, translations, and example sentences.
flashcards.phrasesDesc: Practice common phrases and expressions. Build fluency one phrase at a time.
flashcards.grammarMetaDesc: Study grammar concepts with {count} interactive flashcards.

vocabulary.essentialWordsDesc: The 1000 most frequently used words in English, with Spanish and Chinese translations.
vocabulary.essentialPhrasesDesc: The 500 most frequently used everyday phrases in English, with Spanish and Chinese translations.
vocabulary.essentialExpressionsDesc: Common English idiomatic expressions with Spanish and Chinese translations.

placeholders.noContent: Content will appear here as it is added.
placeholders.searchIndexMissing: Search index not available in development. Run npm run build to generate it.

about.introP1: Grammar Navigator is a multilingual grammar reference and comparison platform. Our core idea is simple:
about.introP2: Instead of learning three separate grammars, you learn one concept and compare how Spanish, English, and Chinese implement it — side by side, on a single page.
about.teamDesc: Grammar Navigator is built and maintained by a small team of multilingual language enthusiasts with backgrounds in linguistics, translation, and software engineering. We are not a language school — we are a reference library created by people who love comparing how languages work.
about.methodologyDesc: Every topic begins with research in authoritative descriptive and pedagogical grammars for each language. We then synthesize the rules into a unified comparison, add real examples, and identify the most common mistakes multilingual learners make. Each topic is reviewed for accuracy before publication.
about.sourcesDesc: We draw from established reference grammars such as the Cambridge Grammar of English, the Nueva Gramática de la Lengua Española (RAE), and the Comprehensive Grammar of Modern Chinese. When rules vary by dialect or register, we note the variation explicitly.
about.transparencyDesc: We do not use AI to generate grammar explanations. All content is researched, written, and reviewed by humans. If you spot an error or disagree with an analysis, we welcome corrections — grammar is complex and conventions evolve.
about.founderDesc: Multilingual language enthusiasts with backgrounds in linguistics, translation, and software engineering.
about.supportUsDesc: If you find Grammar Navigator useful, consider buying us a coffee.
about.openSourceDesc: The site is built as a static resource that scales to more languages and topics over time. Contributions, corrections, and suggestions are always welcome.

contact.responseTimeDesc: We typically respond within 2–3 business days.
contact.whatToInclude1: A clear description of your question or issue
contact.whatToInclude2: The page URL if reporting an error
contact.sent: Message sent! We will get back to you soon.
contact.formError: Something went wrong. Please try again.

error.notFoundDescription: The page you are looking for does not exist or has been moved.
